zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanna Corbet於1261年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾莫雷頓 白 奧斯維斯崔時，她的父親Robert Corbet27歲，母親Ida21歲。她於1290年與Owain ap Griffith Prince Of Upper Powys在英國武斯特斯爾貝斯福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1348年9月29日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾阿其哈姆享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanna Corbet于1261年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾莫雷頓 白 奧斯維斯崔时，她的父亲Robert Corbet27岁，母亲Ida21岁。她于1290年与Owain ap Griffith Prince Of Upper Powys在英国武斯特斯爾貝斯福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1348年9月29日在英国英格兰史洛普爾阿其哈姆享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joanna Corbet was born in 1261, in Moreton by Oswestry, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Corbet, was 27 and her mother, Ida, was 21. She married Owain ap Griffith Prince Of Upper Powys in 1290, in Besford, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 29 September 1348, in Atcham, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 87.

ko.Moreton by Oswestry, Shropshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 비 오스w스트리
ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Corbet(이)가 1261년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 비 오스w스트리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Corbet(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ida(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1290년 영국 워스스터실르 베스퍼드에서 Owain ap Griffith Prince Of Upper Powys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1348년 9월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 앳챔에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Moreton by Oswestry, Shropshire, England: моретон би освестри, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanna Corbet родилась в 1261 г. в местности моретон би освестри, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Corbet было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Ida, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Owain ap Griffith Prince Of Upper Powys в 1290 г. в местности бесфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 29 сентября 1348 г. в местности ачам, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 87 лет.
